prompt: Increase brightness in regions defined by the brightness heatmap.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 by locally increasing its brightness. Use image 2, the provided brightness heatmap, to determine the areas and degree of brightness enhancement. Regions corresponding to brighter (red/yellow) areas in image 2, such as the central 'X' shape, should become significantly brighter and more illuminated in image 1, while darker (blue) areas in image 2 should receive minimal to no brightness increase, maintaining a photorealistic appearance.
